scripts.build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['dist', 'public'].forEach(d => { fs.mkdirSync(d, { recursive: true }); ['index.html', 'style.css', 'script.js'].forEach(f => fs.copyFileSync(f, d + '/' + f)); fs.cpSync('assets', d + '/assets', { recursive: true }); }); console.log('Build complete for all Vercel output directories');"
